overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a coastal medieval village at dusk. The character traverses from a dense forested mountain path into a stone-built fishing settlement with wooden boats and torch-lit buildings, encountering NPC villagers along the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with tall pines

events.description: a villager NPC appears walking in the opposite direction along the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path toward the village

notable_agents.action: villager walking opposite direction along the forest path

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the mountain path
steep rocky cliff face visible through the trees
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense mountain forest at dusk. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path with rocky mountain faces visible to the left. A lone villager passes by walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: exiting dense forest into the built village environment with stone structures

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past stone cottage walls and wooden fences

entered.detail: rough stone wall of a village cottage with small windows
simple wooden post fence along the cottage perimeter
tall stone pillar with burning fire providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into village outskirts with stone cottages and wooden fences. A lit stone brazier provides warm light against the dusk sky as the path continues toward the coast. The dense trees recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal fishing village with beached boats

events.description: reaching the waterfront with wooden fishing boats and ocean visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the coastal path observing the beached boats and water

entered.detail: large wooden longships pulled ashore on the beach
calm sea water visible beyond the boats
low stone wall supporting the elevated village ground
wooden scaffolding and towers near the waterline

segments.scene_description: The path opens to reveal a coastal scene with wooden fishing boats pulled ashore and ocean water visible to the left. Stone walls line the right side while wooden dock structures stand near the waterline. The environment shifts from enclosed village to open waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with stone buildings and inhabitants

events.description: entering the populated village center with multiple NPCs visible
character stops walking and turns to look around the village center

agents.ego_description: Geralt stops to observe the village center, looking at NPCs and the surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on a bench near a building entrance
villager walking up stone stairs in the background

entered.detail: cluster of stone cottages with lit windows and wooden doors
wooden tables and stalls with goods near the buildings
building entrance with warm orange light spilling out
stacked wooden barrels near the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the village center where stone buildings with lit doorways line the path. Several NPC villagers are visible, including one sitting near a building and others walking along the upper paths. The character stops to survey the surroundings, turning to look at the boats and buildings before the clip ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded mountain forest into the heart of a coastal fishing village at dusk. It begins on a narrow dirt trail flanked by tall pine trees and rocky mountain faces, passing a lone villager as the path winds forward. As the dense forest recedes, the scene opens into the village outskirts where stone cottages and wooden fences appear, illuminated by the warm glow of a lit stone brazier. The environment then shifts from these enclosed dwellings to an open waterfront, revealing wooden fishing boats pulled ashore beside the ocean water and stone walls. Finally, the camera enters the village center among stone buildings with lit doorways and several NPCs before turning to survey the surrounding boats and architecture.
